title: Zoro Cuts Through Pica
description: Pages 8–12 focus on zoro cuts through pica, keeping the Dressrosa conflict and character roles clear for display.
scene: This part follows Unknown person #1, Unknown person #2, Unknown person #3, Franky, Unknown person #4, Unknown person #5, Unknown person #6 as zoro defeats Pica, protecting King Riku and proving that Doflamingo's strongest defenses can be broken.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: The facility that's made your tribespeople suffer for so long,

dialogue.speaker: Pica
dialogue.text: The plateau on which the Royal Palace is located

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #16
dialogue.text: You were run- wing your mouth off a minute or two ago, weren't you? Uhahaha!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #17
dialogue.text: Did you think this genius Matador,

dialogue.speaker: Diamante
dialogue.text: Was just a tissue fluttering in the wind?

dialogue.speaker: Colosseum Fighters
dialogue.text: You were never going to be the colosseum's strongest forever!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #19
dialogue.text: The current hero of the colos- Seum...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #20
dialogue.text: Could care less about titles and honors!

dialogue.speaker: Diamante
dialogue.text: Of course, I still flutter when I need to though!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #24
dialogue.text: Uhahaha- Ha! I don't blame you, man!

dialogue.speaker: Dressrosa Citizens
dialogue.text: You've been running around this country all day!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #25
dialogue.text: And now you have been forced to fight on this shaking ground while protecting your daughter at the same time!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #27
dialogue.text: All while standing on one leg! A normal human would have collapsed long ago!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #28
dialogue.text: You've no need to give me a handicap for my lack of a leg.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #29
dialogue.text: If I intended to use my condition as an excuse, I'd never have set foot on the battle- field!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #30
dialogue.text: I offered this leg to the man to whom I owe everything! It is my pride and joy!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #32
dialogue.text: Now that I have your permission, I'll be taking advantage of that handi- cap!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #33
dialogue.text: Finishing off a flag- gig you...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #35
dialogue.text: shall we play a little, first?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #38
dialogue.text: Right! If you look closely, you might be able to see...

dialogue.speaker: Diamante
dialogue.text: A certain something that I've flutter-ified and attached to these scraps of paper!

summary: Zoro Cuts Through Pica advances the Dressrosa story through Unknown person #1, Unknown person #2, Unknown person #3, Franky, Unknown person #4, with unclear voices kept readable rather than forced into unsafe speaker assignments.
